message:
fix(mux): replace try_into().unwrap() with safe cast in tab split resize

In adjust_x_size/adjust_y_size, new_cols/new_rows (isize) were
converted to usize via try_into().unwrap(), which panics if the value
is negative. While the .max(min_x) clamp should prevent this, the
unwrap is not defensive against edge cases. Replace with .max(0) as
usize for explicit non-negative guarantee.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
